import io
import string

fn capitalize_word(_ word: String) -> String
  match string.byte_at(word, 0)
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let upper = string.from_byte(b - 32)
      let rest = string.substring(word, 1, string.len(word))
      "#{upper}#{rest}"
    else
      word
    end
  when None
    word
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
    let n = words.len()
    if n == 0
      println("")
    else
      mut result = capitalize_word(words[0])
      mut i = 1
      while i < n
        match words.get(i)
        when Some(word)
          result = "#{result} #{capitalize_word(word)}"
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
      println(result)
    end
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
